title: FOV Toggle
description: Quickly switch to a different FOV using a keybind
body:
A quick and simple mod for switching to another FOV setting with a Keybind. ### Usage Use the `v` Key to switch to your set FOV setting and again to switch back

Keybind can be changed in the keybind menu

FOV value can be changed through a command: `/fovtoggle [30 - 110]`
